# Curator Receipt

## Decision

The source is kept because it is an institute-worthy preprint with real experimental results.

## Why

The excerpt describes a formal arXiv manuscript with an explicit study design, repository sampling, paired experimental conditions, defined metrics, and reported measured effects on wall-clock runtime and token usage across 10 repositories and 124 pull requests. That is clear empirical substance, not commentary or theorycrafting.

## Limits

# Curator Receipt

## Decision

The source is kept because it is an institute-worthy preprint with real experimental results.

## Why

The excerpt describes a formal arXiv manuscript with an explicit study design, repository sampling, paired experimental conditions, defined metrics, and reported measured effects on wall-clock runtime and token usage across 10 repositories and 124 pull requests. That is clear empirical substance, not commentary or theorycrafting.

## Limits

This is a preprint rather than a published paper, and the visible excerpt indicates scope limits including a small sampled set, constrained task selection, and generated issue statements for some pull requests.
